textByHashes.9516fa194307bd8e634296ca2961be41725b4134: Guthix be praised, the cavalry has arrived! Hero, how would you like to be made an honorary member of the Black Guard?
textByHashes.9551d075ee14e12c172d9f44a829e98aab249d17: Hawhaw! 'What's that' he asks, what a sense of humour! The Black Guard is the finest regiment in the dwarven army. Only the best of the best are allowed to join it and then they receive months of rigorous training.
textByHashes.09a95dd91ef4ca871e15b8c8f30d5a903924bf5f: Hawhaw! 'What's that' she asks, what a sense of humour! The Black Guard is the finest regiment in the dwarven army. Only the best of the best are allowed to join it and then they receive months of rigorous training.
textByHashes.3628fe1e7c1a5cd249811a5d918bd0f9c81deb47: However, we are currently in need of a hero, so for a limited time only I'm offering you, a human, a chance to join this prestigious regiment. What do you say?
textByHashes.f75a2d670daec182fd95c2fd2be2cdf3f2f938d2: That's the spirit! Now trooper, we have no time to waste - the goblins are attacking from the forests to the South. There are so many of them, they are overwhelming my men and breaking through our
textByHashes.cb82cdc767f66cbed0ac1cb7c001926123056e1a: perimeter defences; could you please try to fix the stockade by replacing the broken rails with these new ones?
textByHashes.304b69b63202789516114e4bc8c40177b9f25daa: Report back to me once you've fixed the railings.
textByHashes.06f827910e8af2c6910547616bc7bd7ec678545d: Well best make the most of it while you can, if the goblins over-run us they'll descend on the mines like a plague of locusts!
textByHashes.5db95d65b38ee9e29f8555d12afdfd6b4456cea8: Hello, trooper, how are you doing with those railings?
textByHashes.2b259f63bcb3f27c7dabec80c862c7d1404b8617: The goblins are still getting in, so there must still be some broken railings.
textByHashes.ba69208d44c94bfc5fc3526bc6fc1de6ae854db5: That's okay, we've got plenty, here you go.
textByHashes.331a45d3c7bbb26ccecf24877374fd476439a9b6: There's no room in your backpack, so I can't give you anymore.
textByHashes.ab5a334160aedb57ea25181c49b78ee58b4bef27: Well done, trooper! The goblins seems to have stopped getting in. I think you've done the job!
textByHashes.3ef807155003f0c6978bd22e53083ec87d727cf2: What? I'll have you jailed for desertion!
textByHashes.8cd11bfbab85c7fc70930cdf538fb70672017f96: Besides, I have another commission for you. Just before the goblins over-ran us we lost contact with our watch tower to the South, that's why the goblins managed to catch us unawares. I'd like you to perform
textByHashes.d5c4b1e3244a15810e5daff0a9fac975f1270335: a covert operation into enemy territory, to check up on the guards we have stationed there.
textByHashes.6b5f326f998b0eeb9e53bbb96854a1b885fcda04: They should have reported in by now ...
textByHashes.0d74b71d1ec7ae162be8e0b41c5aa03de88a13ca: Excellent! I have two men there, the dwarf-in-charge is called Gilob, find him and tell him that I'll send him a relief guard just as soon as we mop up these remaining goblins.
textByHashes.844f5af948e7ce52fd435b543aef9fb35ad11ffe: Hello, any news from the watchman?
textByHashes.294a393fe8de554428ea24dcd09538503be53017: Well, as quick as you can then.
textByHashes.22d633e19724c4faa625030439dba78164ada4e6: Have you been to the watch tower yet?
textByHashes.66560b71c9585e353906ed462eeb820ce4d989bc: That's strange, Gilob would never leave his post... His son was also with him, something doesn't smell right. Can you return and look for clues?
textByHashes.70a5bdfe9b1af43984d38d8cf4dadd714b4ac4cf: I can't believe it, Gilob was the finest lieutenant I had! We'll give him a fitting funeral, but what of his command? His son, Lollk, was with him. Did you find his body too?
textByHashes.b6fce1f86cce8fb60bc3fdc910c0fec483431000: The goblins must have taken him. Please traveler, seek out the goblins' hideout and return the lad to us. They always attack from the South-east, so they must be based down there.
textByHashes.b93ab0145e9a5152625daf392735dbe630f67476: He has, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart - without you he'd be a goblin barbecue!
textByHashes.810f2c787d3469d62b3af7ec08394f24385b4c0a: In that case could I ask one more favour of you...
textByHashes.4519335c0f7ce5630893678fedf4c930b9b769c2: When the goblins attacked us some of them managed to slip past my guards and sabotage our cannon. I don't have anybody who understands how it works, could you have a look at it and see if you could get it working for
textByHashes.28bd2c490154e8679f598f29765b017c745bfe83: Thank you, take this toolkit, you'll need it...
textByHashes.9edc25c7a7e37ffce4ed545acd80b28c2bbb445a: You don't have room to take this, report back to me when you do.
textByHashes.ab283bb5e65dd27243143ae4d377b4b583f195fc: Report back to me if you manage to fix it.
textByHashes.b188ea5ece2c9bf1591dd2c13070e31045ddeab9: Fair enough, didn't think you'd be able to help anyway, not much chance for a human to be able to fix it when the best dwarven engineers have failed.
textByHashes.b4e4109bf794cd93f1f23e5fad9cfbb7df90ffad: How are you doing in there, trooper? We've been trying our best with that thing, but I just haven't got the patience.
textByHashes.9a880278d154d22963d3e58ff613e3c09605cc0b: Good stuff, let me know if you have any luck. If we manage to get that thing working, those goblins will be no trouble at all.
textByHashes.c0b6360e53777411bf8fb8511ec4a4e483abe692: That was silly... never mind, I can give you another, but you'll have to free up some space in your backpack first.
textByHashes.0eb7d5f29ac13780542908cca4bc8f7620d10afe: That was silly... never mind, here you go.
textByHashes.4e17f9816920d52734ae91b32ab60ed8a4028e5a: What do you think you're doing, trooper! Did I give you orders to move that cannon? No! Well then don't!
textByHashes.d4192abedf1e1a23603a752cc2be18ee6b8ac9ee: Well I don't believe it, it seems to be working perfectly! I seem to have underestimated you, trooper!
textByHashes.d949fe75f80805c0a155008efa389dcf3779ac15: Not bad at all, your effort is appreciated, my friend. Now, if I could figure what the thing uses as ammo...
textByHashes.da174511325c6e824eb7dac04f605833e60a3872: The Black Guard forgot to send instructions. I know I said that was the last favour, but...
textByHashes.215e1e1c4fe24214804f322210c512ef66b83cfb: I can't leave this post, could you go to the Black Guard base and find out what this thing actually shoots?
textByHashes.fdfcbad0a530dfbb6921e71bd16cef2157ed54ae: That's great, we were lucky you came along when you did. The base is located just South of the Ice Mountain.
textByHashes.cc0be94331e30923d36154f717a1c6536fe971a2: You'll need to speak to Nulodion, the Dwarf Cannon engineer. He's the Weapons Development Chief for the Black Guard, so if anyone knows how to fire this thing, it'll be him.
textByHashes.f6f7c0ea36f35637c40c07e5734e00ffb54c6b29: Hello trooper, any word from the Cannon Engineer?
textByHashes.e169f01fe81542bd5cb07d35ff0a6d56291ab656: The Black Guard camp is South of the Ice Mountain, the quicker we can get some ammo for this thing the quicker those Goblins will leave us be.
textByHashes.fed94279f32ddff05fd17eb9b46e9ea949061539: If you could go back and get another, I'd appreciate it.
textByHashes.87ec85ca89fc3e201ea0dfee2a51d492c6611484: Aah, of course, we make the ammo! This is great, now we will be able to defend ourselves. I don't know how to thank you...
textByHashes.3ee86b41bfcbd08c3f1987ff65b710c525926107: Hah! You'd be lucky, those things are worth a fortune.
textByHashes.7f4cd297cd4f72cbb354992c0a75dcd88dc3a253: I'll tell you what though, I'll write to the Cannon Engineer requesting him to sell you one. He controls production of the cannons.
textByHashes.0d6440707fcec0a6c7557cdbbb8654c7b7828319: He won't be able to give you one, but for the right price, I'm sure he'll sell one to you.
textByHashes.2d399f7af442f96b05c0c5f566f14dc625d225c4: Well hello there, how you doing?
textByHashes.8f54e743f9742b98068904dcd83fc716524625c9: I'm great now, those goblins can't get close with this cannon blasting at them!
textByHashes.2fc534406f7ca8dca644cc1805b7f89787038a40: Don't let any goblins through the breach in our fence!
textByHashes.7eeb78f9efb9f065539df75528ce0d9b136f56e0: Keep an eye open for goblins!
textByHashes.33763853a7131f1398dbda13120bb6c22bae0ab3: Don't just do something! Stand there!
textByHashes.135dc3e7dd7e04071cbbbb3ac3862367289ccc27: Stop dawdling soldier! You're in the army now!
textByHashes.908af600a5ac85452c403504aba2e087c5a9d346: Hurry up on that patrol route, trooper!
